title: Aja Sen
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:AjaSen.png]] |name=Aja Sen |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Medic|Helping Aja|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] with gray topknot |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It's always good to have a doctor like Aja Sen around. I'll help her.|A spacer, to [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]]|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}}}} [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Aja Sen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Medic/Legends|medic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|As you can see, we are a little short-staffed, so every healer helps.''"
"''What can I do?''"
"''Aja Sen could use your help|[[2-1b-58|Billingsly]] and a medic|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Medic|Help the Station's Doctors|Tansarii Point Station}}}} Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Aja Sen resided aboard [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. During that time, she worked in the [[Medical bay/Legends|medical bay]] of Tansarii Point Station, along with the [[Nurse/Legends|nurse]] [[Alisia (Gran)|Alisia]] and the [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]] [[2-1b-58|Billingsly]], treating injured and sick beings on the station. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} the health situation on Tansarii Point Station had become very problematic due to voracious beasts present in the station's atrium and [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] thugs active in lower levels of the station.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=conversation|Alisia|Tansarii Point Station}} In addition, a war erupted between the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] controlling Tansarii Point Station and the [[Rak'qua]] living in the neighboring [[Station Gamma]].{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Spy|Lercer the Spy|Tansarii Point Station}} This led to an abnormal number of hurt people that required care and the medical staff of the station barely handled the situation. Around the same time, a medic arrived on Tansarii Point Station with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] aboard the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Solo recommended the medic who was looking for work to visit the medical bay of the station.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Medic|Medic Work|Tansarii Point Station}} The medic first helped Aja to treat an injured mechanic who burned his hand while repairing a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. The medic was then dispatched to handle a medical emergency on the lower level of the station. An accident took place in Storage Room 01 and a technician was poisoned as he inhaled too much smoke. Billingsly was able to prepare an antitoxin and the medic successfully treated the injured technician. The droid eventually granted the medic a [[Kallidahin/Legends|Polis Massan]] bracelet and a medic uniform as a reward for the assistance provided to the medical staff of Tansarii Point Station.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Medic|Medical Emergency|Tansarii Point Station}} In the meantime, Aja Sen grew increasingly concerned about the hostilities between Tansarii Point Station and Station Gamma. She therefore hired a spacer involved in the fightings to kill several Rak'qua warriors in Station Gamma and bring her back Rak'qua [[Blood/Legends|blood]] samples. The spacer succeeded in the mission and Aja then performed tests to analyze Rak'qua [[DNA/Legends|DNA]].{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Gathering Evidence|Tansarii Point Station}} ==Behind the scenes== Aja Sen appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Aja Sen was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Gathering Evidence}} *{{SWGWiki|Help the Station's Doctors}} *{{SWGWiki|Helping Aja}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sen, Aja}} [[Category:Bothans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Healers and doctors]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
